pr_text:
## Title: Fix HARQ redundancy version handling in MCH PDU processing

### Summary
Fixed a HARQ process configuration error in the multicast channel (MCH) PDU processing path. The `handle_nfapi_mch_pdu` function was incorrectly hardcoding the redundancy version (`rvidx`) to 0 instead of using the actual value provided in the incoming PDU's REL-8 structure. This caused improper HARQ combining behavior for multicast transmissions, leading to potential data corruption and throughput degradation. The
